title: ErrMultipleImages does not work
body:
From https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/8176#issuecomment-738908444 , not fixed in #8609:

- If `findImageInRepoTags` fails with `errors.Wrapf(define.ErrMultipleImages, searchName)`
- The caller in https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/f01630acf35a11aecdbfb9b77b249dcec85e67b5/libpod/image/image.go#L496-L500 just throws away that value and returns `ErrNoSuchImage`…
- … causing the error value check in https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/f01630acf35a11aecdbfb9b77b249dcec85e67b5/pkg/domain/infra/abi/images.go#L43-L44 to not trigger, and `Exists` to return `false`.

_Originally posted by @mtrmac in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/8176#issuecomment-738908444_
